title: Golem Gear
description: A Mod themed off of Iron Golems. The mod adds many features such as golem blocks, golem ores, golem tools, and much more!
body:
### The Golem Gear Mod

This is what I call "The Golem Mod". I call it this because it adds many different blocks, tools, armor, among other things.

The Golem mod includes new blocks, tools, armor, a new mob, and much more. You will have to find all of this out for yourself and see if you like this mod.

Just to say, this is my first mod that I've coded that I've ever released and I'm fairly new to the world of modding, but I'm trying to learn more and more. That's all I have to say!
